_README: Qdrant deployment sample. Copy the relevant fragments into your environment-specific appsettings file.
_NOTE_PayloadIndexes: Startup ensure creates keyword indexes for tenant_id, document_id and document_type_code, and an integer index for chunk_index. Host-level tenant_id is encoded as the keyword string '__host__'.
_NOTE_Rebuild: If the embedding model or vector dimension changes, use a fresh Qdrant collection name or recreate the collection, then re-run document embedding jobs.
